nl_query: For each script with an active legal hold, show the hold duration in days, whether the hold overlaps with the board evaluation deadline, whether the script has already been published, and the case reference number.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.id, sh.script_id, sh.case_id, sh.hold_start_date, sh.hold_end_date, sh.hold_reason, sh.is_active, sh.released_at, a.urn, a.evaluation_status, a.published_at, sh.case_id AS case_reference_number, (CURRENT_DATE - sh.hold_start_date) AS days_held, CASE WHEN sh.hold_end_date IS NOT NULL AND sh.hold_end_date < a.board.deadline THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS overlaps_with_board_deadline, CASE WHEN a.published_at IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS script_published
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.published_at, answer_script.published_at. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
